message:
Add shell completion command for bash, zsh, and fish

Implements `jfp completion --shell <shell>` command that generates
shell-specific completion scripts:

- bash: Uses complete/compgen with command-aware option completion
- zsh: Uses compdef/_arguments with typed option values
- fish: Uses complete with subcommand-aware flag completion

Features:
- Auto-detects shell from $SHELL environment variable
- Completes all jfp commands (list, search, render, copy, etc.)
- Provides command-specific option completion
- Supports option value completion for --shell and --format

Usage:
  eval "$(jfp completion --shell bash)"
  jfp completion --shell zsh >> ~/.zshrc
  jfp completion --shell fish > ~/.config/fish/completions/jfp.fish

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
